title: Crispy Salted Saudi Pork Shoulder Crumble
description: This dish features a crispy and salty pork shoulder topped with a crunchy crumble that is both diabetic-friendly and perfect for weeknight meals.
instructions: Season pork shoulder generously with salt.
Wrap the meat in aluminum foil and place it on a baking sheet. Roast for 4 hours or until internal temperature reaches 165°F (75°C).
In a mixing bowl, combine crushed nuts, jaggery syrup, and paleo-friendly breadcrumbs. Mix well to create a crumble.
Once the pork shoulder is cooked, remove from oven and let it rest for about 10 minutes. Transfer meat onto a cutting board and slice into bite-sized pieces.
Drizzle sliced pork with remaining crumbs on top before serving.
